text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from an outing with Mejiro
Dober...

Urgh... I can't give up looking yet! Hang in there a
little longer, quads!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm pretty sure that was Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober! Well, the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, Ryan and some friends were invited
to a neighborhood concert as guest performers,
but someone had to drop out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The concert's this evening, but I can't find a
replacement!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! I haven't even said
anything yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Goodness... You saw right through me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Ryan? Can you teach me the songs and
choreography?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Ryan? Can you teach me the songs and
choreography?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What?! Does that mean you're willing to be our
replacement member?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That'd be great, but... you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It won't be easy, but...

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
Star light, star bright, I wish to become a big,
strong racer who can win any race!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As long as you take it one step at a time, you'll
move closer to not only me... but also the racer
you want to become.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I'm going to keep moving forward. And just like I
promised myself when I was little...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best not to be a burden!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, you'd never be a burden! You're the
best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Dober. And thanks to your trainer too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And now for the final pose!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That was good! I'm glad the outfit is the right size
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... It looks like we'll be ready for the performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Uh-huh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. I'll do my best.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Next up is what you've all been waiting for! Our
special guest performance for the night!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I almost gave up on my childhood dream
because I thought I could never make it happen,
but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I'm going to reach for it once more... with
Trainer, this time!)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! That was awesome, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, there will be fireworks after the
performance. They're about to start.
choice_data_list: You did great during the concert.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.
choice_data_list: You were so bold and confident out there.
Aren't you going to join the after-party?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... I really feel like I accomplished
something.
choice_data_list: You were so bold and confident out there.
Aren't you going to join the after-party?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Y-you're just saying that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Y-you did?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Still, if my passion really did come across and
everyone was able to see how much I've
changed...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If my passion really did come across and everyone
was able to see how much I've changed...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Then I'm glad I mustered up the courage to
perform.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Then... I'm glad I mustered up the courage to
perform.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know this sounds weird, but... these fireworks
look even more beautiful than the ones I saw as a
child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know this sounds weird, but... these fireworks
look even more beautiful than the ones I saw as a
child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I was the one who decided to perform.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I was the one who decided to perform.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And I could never embarrass myself in front of a
crowd or my da—ahem, my friends.
choice_data_list: I'm sure he's always watching over you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And I can't embarrass myself in front of an
audience... or my dad.
choice_data_list: I'm sure he's always watching over you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's not like I need him to!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I hope he is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But, maybe if he saw that, he'd realize he doesn't
have to be so overprotective anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Then I could tell him he doesn't need to worry
about me anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know this sounds weird, but... these fireworks
look even more beautiful than the ones I saw as a
child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know this sounds weird, but... these fireworks
look even more beautiful than the ones I saw as a
child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I got invited, but... I hardly know anyone there.
Besides, I kind of just butted into this whole
thing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I got invited, but... I hardly know anyone there.
Besides, I kind of just butted into this whole
thing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And I had to come tell you I was all done,
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I just want to watch the fireworks with
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So... What did you think of the concert?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...So, how do you think I did?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: O-oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know this sounds weird, but... these fireworks
look even more beautiful than the ones I saw as a
child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know this sounds weird, but... these fireworks
look even more beautiful than the ones I saw as a
child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I want to keep improving and become even more radiant. No, I don't just want to—I'll make it happen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fireworks light up the sky as she makes her vow,
and I make my own to support her as best I can to
make that wish come true.
